channel.title: Engineering on Archit's Space
channel.description: Recent content in Engineering on Archit's Space

item.title: Building Persistent Memory for AI Agents: Architecture Decisions in Memori
item.description: A deep dive into the engineering decisions behind Memori -- a persistent memory system for AI coding agents built on Rust, SQLite, and fastembed. Covers hybrid search with RRF, access decay scoring, cosine deduplication, and why I deliberately chose brute-force over indexing.

item.title: Designing CLI Tools for AI Agents: Lessons from Building Memori
item.description: A practitioner's guide to designing command-line tools that AI coding agents can use effectively -- covering output modes, error design, behavioral snippets, and the subtle art of making machines help themselves.

item.title: The AI-Augmented Developer Playbook: Architect, Delegate, Validate
item.description: A practical playbook for shifting from code-producing craftsman to AI-orchestrating architect, using abstract thinking, pattern libraries, and rigorous validation to ship higher-leverage systems.
